dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: commercial — buyer valuing the free delivery + setup service bundled with every puppy
dual_intent_strategy.secondary_intent: informational — new owner researching how to bring a puppy home smoothly
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: Describe the delivery + setup + walkthrough service concretely (no competitor documents theirs at all), and fold in the homecoming-day best practices so the page also answers 'how do I bring a new puppy home'.

meta_title: Free Puppy Home Delivery & Setup Singapore | Curious Tails
meta_description: Free puppy home delivery across Singapore with every puppy: playpen set up before your puppy explores, a 30+ item kit walkthrough, and delivery timed to your schedule.
h1: Free Home Delivery, Playpen Setup Included

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop in Balestier, Singapore (licence AS24J00046) that delivers every puppy home free, sets up the playpen before the puppy explores, and walks the owner through the full 30+ item starter kit.

Puppy home delivery is the handover step between reserving a puppy and living with it: transporting the puppy safely, setting up its space, and briefing the owner. Done well, it is scheduled around the family, includes physical setup, and ends with the owner knowing the routine, not holding a box.

serp_analysis.dominant_content_format: pet shop homepages + supply-store delivery pages + listicles
serp_analysis.search_intent_confirmation: Commercial-leaning but underserved: searchers want a shop that delivers the puppy; results are mostly generic shops or supply delivery.

puppy home delivery Singapore: related: cheap/best puppy home delivery singapore

faq.question: Is delivery really free, island-wide?
faq.answer_direction: Yes, free across Singapore with every puppy, including the setup and walkthrough; it is inside the $2,888 to $4,488 price.

faq.question: How long does the delivery and setup take?
faq.answer_direction: Plan for about an hour: setup first, then the item-by-item walkthrough; longer if you have questions, and questions are encouraged.

faq.question: Can I collect my puppy from the shop instead?
faq.answer_direction: Yes, collection from Balestier is fine; we still send you home with the kit and run the walkthrough at the shop.

faq.question: How long can you board my puppy after the deposit?
faq.answer_direction: Until you are ready; lodging and food are covered free. Renovation overruns and trips are the normal reasons, and we plan the delivery date around them.

faq.question: What paperwork comes with the puppy?
faq.answer_direction: Health records, vaccination records, and microchip details; dog licensing is completed with our assistance at purchase, so it is already in order by delivery day.

faq.question: What should I do in the first 24 hours?
faq.answer_direction: Keep it calm: let your puppy explore the set-up playpen at its own pace, feed the same food at fixed times, skip visitors, and expect some night whimpering; it is adjustment, not distress.
